---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.column-screen .gradient-banner}
# Resume
### Han (Simon) Yan — Data Science & AI Assurance
:::

::: {.resume-actions}
<a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf" download class="resume-btn resume-btn--primary">
  ⬇ Download PDF
</a>
<a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf" target="_blank" class="resume-btn resume-btn--secondary">
  ↗ Open in New Tab
</a>
:::

::: {.resume-embed-wrapper}
<iframe
  src="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf"
  class="resume-iframe"
  title="Simon Yan Resume"
  loading="lazy">
  <p>Your browser does not support PDF preview.
  <a href="assets/pdf/Simon Yan.pdf">Click here to download.</a></p>
</iframe>
:::
